title: CVF As-Built System Catalog Schema
description: T0 schema contract only. No implementation, generator, checker, or populated record exists yet. Every entity, field, and enum below is DOC_ONLY_NEW unless explicitly marked as reusing an existing CVF-governed token. Round 2: every conditional invariant below is expressed with standard JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 keywords (if/then/allOf/not/anyOf/required/minItems/minLength/const) and is verified with jsonschema.Draft202012Validator against positive and negative fixtures recorded in the paired worker return; no invariant is claimed as machine-enforced without a negative fixture proving the validator rejects it.
claimBoundary: This schema defines vocabulary, structure, and machine-enforced conditional invariants for EDGE, GAP, and AUTHORITY_SOURCE records. It does not certify that any record, aggregate, generator, or checker described here has been implemented. See CVF_AS_BUILT_SYSTEM_CATALOG_TOPOLOGY_DECISIONS.md for implementation-deferred status of every reserved path named in this file.

stableId.description: Stable-ID grammar (DOC_ONLY_NEW): cvf.asc.<entityTypeLower>.<slug>.<versionTag>. The version tag increments only when a record's meaning changes incompatibly; a corrected typo or citation refresh does not increment it.

authorityClass.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW. Distinguishes authority weight for reconciliation precedence. FROZEN_DOCTRINE outranks all other classes for layer-naming/architectural claims per ECOSYSTEM/doctrine/CVF_LAYER_MODEL.md Repository Integrity Rule 3. LEGACY_EVIDENCE_ONLY (e.g. .private_reference/legacy/) is never promoted to a higher class by catalog admission alone.

maturity.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW enum aligned to the vocabulary already used in docs/reference/CVF_MODULE_INVENTORY.md's Operational status column (frozen, active, local-ready, legacy-reference, draft) plus VALUE_PARKED for CVF_VALUE_PARKED_LANE_REOPEN_DISCIPLINE_STANDARD_2026-06-25.md-governed lanes.

boundaryCaveat.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW field required whenever an owner is active but explicitly non-equivalent to a doctrine-named or otherwise expected location (the R98/R99 'active owner with boundary' pattern: ACTIVE_OWNER_CREATED_WITH_BOUNDARY, NAMED_DIFFERENTLY_ACTIVE_OWNER_WITH_BOUNDARY). Must state what the owner does NOT claim (e.g. does not claim the doctrine-named path, does not claim exact-text equivalence). minLength 1 rejects an empty-string placeholder; presence-when-required is enforced by GAP's allOf/if/then block below, not by prose alone.

rejectedCandidates.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW. Every plausible owner considered and rejected before the final owner (or SOURCE_OWNER_UNRESOLVED_WITH_SEARCH_EVIDENCE) was recorded, matching the R96/R97/R98/R99 candidate-search method.

negativeSearchEvidence.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW. Record of an executed negative search (a check that something does NOT exist or is NOT the case), not merely an absence of a positive claim.

priorDisposition.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW. The immediately preceding terminal disposition token for this record's subject, if one exists, e.g. LEGACY_ONLY_GAP, PARTIAL_ACTIVE_OWNER, SOURCE_OWNER_UNRESOLVED_WITH_SEARCH_EVIDENCE. Empty string or omitted when this is the first terminal disposition.

supersededBy.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW. The stableId of the record (or the accepted review artifact path) that superseded this one, if any. Empty string or omitted when this record is current.

PLANE.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity: a responsibility domain in the actual system chain (e.g. Doctrine-to-Contract, Contract-to-Runtime).

planeMembership.description: N/A for PLANE itself; present for schema symmetry with MODULE.

freshnessInputs.description: Repo-relative paths whose drift requires a fresh review of this record.

MODULE.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity: a bounded implementation, governance, evidence, or operator owner (e.g. an EXTENSIONS/ package, a governance/ subfolder).

INTERFACE.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity: a contract, schema, registry, command, API, file protocol, or handoff boundary.

edgeProofClass.description: Reused from the roadmap's Edge Proof Taxonomy (docs/roadmaps/CVF_AS_BUILT_ARCHITECTURE_AND_SYSTEM_CATALOG_ROADMAP_2026-07-11.md, Edge Proof Taxonomy section), refined per F4 of the Claude rebuttal (evidenceRecency and operatorVisibility below). The three cross-field invariants for this enum are machine-enforced by EDGE's allOf/if/then block, not by this description.

evidenceRecency.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW, added per Claude rebuttal F4. HISTORICAL_TRACE means the evidence is a past PASS record (e.g. a trace document's Status line), not a current live receipt; this qualifier prevents a stale trace from being silently read as a current live receipt (R90 Audit A Lane 3's exact distinction). EDGE's allOf/if/then block rejects NOT_APPLICABLE whenever edgeProofClass is EXECUTED_AND_EVIDENCED_EDGE or OPERATOR_VISIBLE_EDGE.

operatorVisibility.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW, added per Claude rebuttal F4/F10. CI_ONLY means the edge executes only inside a CI job with no operator-facing readout (the RUNTIME_TO_ENFORCEMENT lane's exact posture: CVF_SYSTEM_CHAIN_MAP.json 'operatorSurface': 'GitHub Actions job log ... CI-only'). EDGE's allOf/if/then block rejects edgeProofClass OPERATOR_VISIBLE_EDGE unless operatorVisibility is exactly OPERATOR_SURFACED.

EDGE.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity: a directed relationship between owners or planes. Round 2: three cross-field invariants are machine-enforced below via allOf/if/then/not, verified against positive and negative fixtures in the paired worker return.

sampledOnly.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW. True when this edge's proof class was established via a bounded sample, not exhaustive verification (matching R90's explicit 3-of-50 sampling caveat). Must not be silently dropped when the edge is later cited in an aggregate claim.

allOf.$comment: Invariant 1 (Round 2 reviewer finding): OPERATOR_VISIBLE_EDGE is valid only when operatorVisibility is exactly OPERATOR_SURFACED. This is the exact case the reviewer's negative instance (edgeProofClass=OPERATOR_VISIBLE_EDGE, operatorVisibility=CI_ONLY) must now fail on.
Invariant 2: EXECUTED_AND_EVIDENCED_EDGE and OPERATOR_VISIBLE_EDGE must not carry evidenceRecency NOT_APPLICABLE.
Invariant 3: any edgeProofClass other than DECLARED_EDGE requires at least one citation.

CONTROL.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity: blocking, advisory, informational, or documentation-only enforcement.

EVIDENCE_OWNER.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity: receipt, test, audit, log, ledger, or review surface.

OPERATOR_SURFACE.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity: where a human discovers, invokes, or interprets the result.

gapTerminalStatus.description: Reused from the roadmap's Gap Ledger canonical statuses (first 8 values), with two values added per Claude rebuttal F2/F8 fold: ACTIVE_OWNER_CREATED_WITH_BOUNDARY (R99 L1 disposition) and NAMED_DIFFERENTLY_ACTIVE_OWNER_WITH_BOUNDARY (R98 L2 disposition, R96 L2 ADAPTATION_CANDIDATE terminology retired in favor of this ratified token). All three GAP cross-field invariants tied to these statuses are machine-enforced by GAP's allOf/if/then block, not by this description.

GAP.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity: missing, partial, intentionally separated, parked, or unresolved connection. gapId equals stableId for this entity type. Round 2: three cross-field invariants are machine-enforced below via allOf/if/then/anyOf, verified against positive and negative fixtures in the paired worker return.

sourceOwner.description: Current governed path, or the literal string NONE_WITH_REASON followed by a reason.

targetOwner.description: Current governed path, or the literal string NONE_WITH_REASON followed by a reason.

impact.description: Bounded consequence only, not speculative severity inflation (roadmap requirement, line 151).

closeCondition.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW, structured per Claude rebuttal F6 so a free-text field cannot trivially satisfy 'measurable'.

reopenCondition.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW, structured identically to closeCondition and bound to CVF_VALUE_PARKED_LANE_REOPEN_DISCIPLINE_STANDARD_2026-06-25.md's checkable-condition bar. GAP's allOf/if/then block requires non-empty conditionText whenever currentStatus is VALUE_PARKED_WITH_REOPEN_CONDITIONS.

actionOwner.description: A roadmap ID, tranche ID, role name, or the literal string PARKED_WITH_REASON followed by a reason.

allOf.$comment: Invariant 1 (Round 2): boundary-owner statuses require a non-empty boundaryCaveat.
Invariant 2 (Round 2): VALUE_PARKED_WITH_REOPEN_CONDITIONS requires a non-empty reopenCondition.conditionText.
Invariant 3 (Round 2): SOURCE_OWNER_UNRESOLVED_WITH_SEARCH_EVIDENCE requires at least one of rejectedCandidates (non-empty) or negativeSearchEvidence (non-empty).

AUTHORITY_SOURCE.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW entity added per Claude rebuttal F3: a doctrine, standard, or accepted-review artifact whose authorityClass governs admission/precedence for other entities. Not modeled as a MODULE because MODULE does not carry freeze semantics. Round 2: the frozen-to-authorityClass invariant is machine-enforced below via if/then in one direction only (frozen=true REQUIRES authorityClass=FROZEN_DOCTRINE); the converse (authorityClass=FROZEN_DOCTRINE REQUIRES frozen=true) is deliberately NOT enforced, so the description below is worded to match that one-directional scope and does not overclaim a bidirectional guarantee.

frozen.description: One-directional invariant, machine-enforced: frozen=true REQUIRES authorityClass=FROZEN_DOCTRINE. The converse is not enforced - an authorityClass of FROZEN_DOCTRINE does not require frozen=true, since a doctrine-authority record could in principle describe a not-yet-frozen draft doctrine section. When true, this record's own content fields must not be described as catalog-editable; only the catalog's citation of it may be refreshed.

allOf.$comment: Invariant (Round 2, one-directional per this entity's own description): frozen=true REQUIRES authorityClass=FROZEN_DOCTRINE. The converse is intentionally not enforced.

admissionDisposition.description: Reused verbatim from the roadmap's Catalog Admission Rules (docs/roadmaps/CVF_AS_BUILT_ARCHITECTURE_AND_SYSTEM_CATALOG_ROADMAP_2026-07-11.md lines 175-181).

entities.description: DOC_ONLY_NEW. Reserved for future ASC-T1+ population. Empty in this T0 schema contract; see CVF_AS_BUILT_SYSTEM_CATALOG_TOPOLOGY_DECISIONS.md for the compact-source-plus-generated-aggregate layout this array will use once implemented.
